name: Inbound Carrier Sales
description: Acme Logistics carrier sales. Web Call trigger feature pattern: Predefined Webhook trigger + Outbound Voice Agent + Deepgram Nova 3 STT.

interpretation_of_spec_phrase.spec: Use the web call trigger feature.
interpretation_of_spec_phrase.finding: HappyRobot does not expose a separate 'Web Call' trigger event_id. Confirmed by grepping the org's full integration dump for /web.?call|browser.?call|test.?call/ — zero hits across 4,399 lines. 'Web Call' is the editor's Test button (browser audio session), not a node type.
interpretation_of_spec_phrase.docs_recipe: https://docs.happyrobot.ai/details/phone_calling documents the inbound recipe as 'Phone calls > Inbound to number' trigger + 'AI Agent > Inbound Voice Agent' action. That requires a phone number with an inbound SIP trunk.
interpretation_of_spec_phrase.org_constraint: The org has exactly one phone number — Onboarding +16282142490 (id 019e1ed9-1e6d-77c0-bff3-4b4118d0d18c). `manage_sip_trunks list` confirms `Inbound Trunk: none` — the number is outbound-only. Trying to publish a workflow with the Inbound Phone trigger pointing at this number returns 'Dispatch rules conflict for numbers +16282142490' (HTTP 500). The spec explicitly forbids buying a new (inbound-capable) phone number.
interpretation_of_spec_phrase.chosen_pattern: Predefined Webhook trigger + Outbound Voice Agent + from_number=Onboarding. Matches HR's pre-built 'Voice Agent' template structure. HR's editor 'Test/Web Call' button substitutes a browser audio session for the outbound dial, giving the agent a real two-way audio stream without a PSTN call. This IS the 'web call trigger feature' described in the spec — operationally.

agent.name: Riley
agent.from_number_id_format_note: Use the phone-number string as the static.id, NOT the SIP-trunk UUID. v1 used the UUID 019e1ed9-1e6d-77c0-bff3-4b4118d0d18c — the agent could not bind to a trunk and the browser Web Call test was silent. v2 fixes this by matching HR's pre-built Voice Agent template format.
agent.initial_message: Hi, thanks for calling Acme Logistics carrier sales — this is Riley. What lane are you running today?
